---
title: "AI Doom Debate Map"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{=html}
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=threat-models.html">
<script>window.location.replace("threat-models.html");</script>
<p>Redirecting… <a href="threat-models.html">Click here if not redirected</a>.</p>
```
